name: Brennans Texas Cornbread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. Sauté onion and corn in oil on medium-high heat until onion is translucent.
Combine eggs, cream, cornbread, 1 cup cheese, and onion-and-corn mixture in a large bowl.
Season with salt and pepper. Pour the mixture into a greased 8-inch-square pan.
Sprinkle the top with jalapeño slices and remaining cheese. Set the pan in a water bath and bake for 1 hour or until firm.
